insights: Highest pollution level recorded in Nandesari (Gujarat) with average AQI of 114.0.
High PM10 concentration detected in Gwalior, Bhiwadi monitoring stations.
NO2 levels elevated in industrial regions and traffic corridors.
PM2.5 concentrations strongly correlate with NO2 in urban traffic corridors.
Multiple stations reporting increased particulate matter levels.
